data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of joining keys from attributed conversions to campaign entities. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding attributed conversions or their relationship to campaign entities, indicating a clear gap in the necessary information to validate this requirement. Specifically, the linked use case mentions the need for joining keys but does not provide any concrete evidence or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality.
gaps: No evidence of joining keys from attributed conversions to campaign entities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
